videos.headline: No. 25 Texas A&M blows out No. 9 Missouri for impressive win
videos.description: Texas A&M gets up big early and never looks back as they blow out Missouri 41-10 at home.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (No. 25 Texas A&M blows out No. 9 Missouri for impressive win) 2024/10/05 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Amari Daniels powers Texas A&M ahead with short TD
videos.description: Amari Daniels muscles his way into the end zone for a short touchdown and Texas A&M lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amari Daniels powers Texas A&M ahead with short TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luther Burden's 75-yard TD called back due to a penalty
videos.description: Luther Burden III heads to the sideline after his 75-yard touchdown is called back with an ineligible man downfield penalty.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Luther Burden's 75-yard TD called back due to a penalty) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amari Daniels scores his 2nd TD of the day
videos.description: Amari Daniels gives Texas A&M a 17-0 lead with his second short rushing touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amari Daniels scores his 2nd TD of the day) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas A&M's Jahdae Walker wrestles ball away from defender for amazing catch
videos.description: Texas A&M converts the third down as Jahdae Walker goes up and takes the ball away from the defender for a 40-yard gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M's Jahdae Walker wrestles ball away from defender for amazing catch) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss falls into end zone for Texas A&M TD
videos.description: Texas A&M goes up 24-0 in the second quarter as Le'Veon Moss scores from short yardage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le'Veon Moss falls into end zone for Texas A&M TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas A&M's punt somehow doesn't go into the end zone
videos.description: Texas A&M's Tyler White sees his punt come within inches of the goal line before rolling out of bounds.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M's punt somehow doesn't go into the end zone) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss takes the first play of the second half 75 yards for a TD
videos.description: Texas A&M goes up 31-0 after the first play of the second half as Le'Veon Moss goes 75 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le'Veon Moss takes the first play of the second half 75 yards for a TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri finally gets on the board with a 59-yard TD
videos.description: Brady Cook heaves it long to Theo Wease Jr. for a 59-yard touchdown in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri finally gets on the board with a 59-yard TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss scores his 3rd TD of the day
videos.description: Le'Veon Moss gets the corner and finds the end zone for his third score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le’Veon Moss scores his 3rd TD of the day) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
